hero.question: Will Trump declare war on Iran by April 30, 2026?
hero.prob_take: The crowd has priced Iran war as a 1-in-11 shot, treating it as tail risk rather than genuine possibility, even as Trump returns to office with a hawkish cabinet and Iran's nuclear program accelerating. Watch for escalation around uranium enrichment or proxy attacks on US assets in the Gulf, not declarations alone, since Trump typically conducts military action without formal war declarations.

daily_take.headline: Iran War Odds Crater 13 Points. Market Finally Pricing Reality.
daily_take.deck: Trump-Iran war odds dropped from 21.8% to 8.8% in 24 hours on fresh headlines suggesting diplomatic posturing rather than military escalation. The market overshot on rhetoric. At 8.8%, you're getting paid for a worst-case scenario that becomes less likely every month we don't see USS carriers in the Persian Gulf. Smart money is fading the fear trade.
